title: Linked Worktrees and Parallel Branch Operations · Graph Retrieval
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs linked worktrees and parallel branch operations from terse repository evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the multi-worktree ownership and cleanup map. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for multi-worktree ownership and cleanup map after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish common repository data from per-worktree HEAD, index, refs, operation state, config, and administrative links.
Add branch, detached, orphan, and relative-path worktrees; then lock, unlock, repair, and move them with path and device constraints.
Reason about checked-out branch exclusivity, shared refs, concurrent fetch or maintenance, and safe cross-worktree branch deletion and rewrite.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# git-advanced cumulative repository evidence notebook
# Git operations change only disposable simulated repository state.
# Inspect status, diffs, graph, refs, and recovery before every mutation.

steps.title: Gita Worktree Common Perworktree · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — Case G61 is a review in a disposable repository. a stale administrative entry is locking the release branch after its directory moved. The learner must predict porcelain output separates paths, HEAD IDs, branches, lock reasons, and prunable state, run git worktree list --porcelain, explain the release worktree points to a missing path and is locked with a documented owner reason, test this changed condition: move the main repository path and require worktree repair before any prune decision, and preserve this recovery boundary: lock valuable external worktrees and back up untracked outputs before administrative repair.

Which action demonstrates Gita Worktree Common Perworktree without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for distinguish common repository data from per-worktree head, index, refs, operation state, config, and administrative links.

content.text: Case G61 is a review in a disposable repository. a stale administrative entry is locking the release branch after its directory moved. Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Each linked worktree contains an independent clone and object database.

stimulus.title: Gita Parallel Operation Policy case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Case G67 is a review in a disposable repository. a stale administrative entry is locking the release branch after its directory moved. The learner must predict porcelain output separates paths, HEAD IDs, branches, lock reasons, and prunable state, run git worktree list --porcelain, explain the release worktree points to a missing path and is locked with a documented owner reason, test this changed condition: move the main repository path and require worktree repair before any prune decision, and preserve this recovery boundary: lock valuable external worktrees and back up untracked outputs before administrative repair.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Worktrees isolate hooks, config, ignored build outputs, and secrets by default.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design named purpose, directory, branch, owner, lock, tool-cache, secret, cleanup, and handoff rules for parallel work. Artifact under review: multi-worktree ownership and cleanup map.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Gita Parallel Operation Policy, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Record what required effort

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Design named purpose, directory, branch, owner, lock, tool-cache, secret, cleanup, and handoff rules for parallel work.
